home.hero_subtitle: CyberAgent is an open-source library of 70+ AI agent personalities. Each character runs a behavior tree that drives a real robot — RoboMaster, mBot, and more.
home.feature_agents_desc: Each agent has unique behavior trees defining personality, reactions, and movement patterns.
home.feature_robot_desc: Bridge virtual agents to physical hardware — RoboMaster, LEGO, and more.
home.feature_evolve_desc: Every day, autonomously review, iterate, and improve the platform.
home.agents_subtitle: Choose a character to bring to life
home.step_1_desc: Browse our gallery of unique virtual agents with distinct personalities.
home.step_3_desc: The robot comes alive as your chosen character at home.
home.cta_desc: Explore our agent gallery and find your perfect companion.
home.arch_char_desc: Pick from 70+ unique agent personalities, each with distinct emotions, reactions, and movement styles.
home.arch_bt_desc: Each character is defined by a composable behavior tree using seq, sel, cond, and act nodes.
home.arch_robot_desc: Connect to RoboMaster EP, mBot, or any supported platform and watch the character come alive.
home.code_desc: Define a character's entire personality in a single behavior tree. Use the visual editor or write the DSL directly.
home.how_result: No hardware coding. Just define the personality.

gallery.title: Agent Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Explore all 70+ AI characters. Click any card to preview behavior, personality, and tags — then launch one in the playground.
gallery.no_results: No agents found matching your search.

agent.telemetry_empty: Start the behavior tree to see telemetry
agent.canvas_hint: Move your mouse over the canvas to interact

docs.title: Documentation
docs.getting_started_desc: Learn how to set up and run CyberAgent.
docs.architecture_desc: Understand the platform's design and components.
docs.robots_desc: Supported robot platforms and integration guides.
docs.agents_guide_desc: How to create custom virtual agents.
docs.migration_desc: Breaking changes and how to upgrade.

telemetry.empty: Start the behavior tree to see telemetry

marketplace.title: Character Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Download character files for your robot. Grab individual characters or entire category packs to deploy straight to RoboMaster, mBot, and more.
marketplace.packs_hint: Download all characters in a category at once
marketplace.submit_desc: Built something cool? Contribute your character to the community and let others use it on their robots.
marketplace.submit_step1: Create a character in the editor
marketplace.submit_step2: Export the behavior tree as JSON
marketplace.submit_step3: Open a GitHub issue to submit
